bead.title: align project documents and bead fixtures with app e2e expectations
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The fixture-backed app e2e suite currently fails in the project documents and beads flows. The current `cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/app.spec.ts` expects the fixture project to render Documents and Beads with the current empty-state/count and row-navigation contracts, but the live app behavior has drifted enough that TC-002 and TC-003 are failing on this tree.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
- `cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/app.spec.ts:176-258` asserts the project-scoped Documents and Beads behavior that is now failing in the suite.
- `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/documents/+page.svelte:1-42` renders the documents table and empty state.
- `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/beads/+layout.svelte:272-273` and `:422-442` drive bead row navigation and table rendering.

PROPOSED FIX
Investigate the fixture-backed project documents/beads experience end-to-end, then make the page behavior and/or the app-spec assertions line up with the current contract. Keep the fix tight to the documents and beads flows; do not fold in screenshot or sessions work here.

NON-SCOPE
- Sessions or review-session routing.
- Screenshot baseline refresh.
- The 2k scale fixture bead.

ACCEPTANCE
1. `cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/app.spec.ts` TC-002 and TC-003 pass on the fixture project.
2. `cd cli && bun run test:e2e -- --grep "TC-002|TC-003"` passes.
3. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
